name: pytest-xdist
description: Pytest plugin for distributed test execution across multiple CPUs and machines, plus loop-on-failures modes to speed up large test suites.

seo.title: pytest-xdist — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: pytest-xdist: Pytest plugin for distributed test execution across multiple CPUs and machines, plus loop-on-failures modes to speed up large test suites.

when_to_use: Distribute pytest tests across multiple CPU cores
Run test suites in parallel across remote machines
Loop-on-failures mode to reproduce intermittent bugs
Speed up large Python test suites by 4-8x in CI

pros: Distributes tests across CPUs and machines
Massive wall-clock gains on large suites
cons: Test isolation bugs surface under parallelism
DB tests often need per-worker databases
review.verdict: Mandatory once your pytest suite crosses a few minutes, though it will expose hidden coupling between tests.
review.best_for: Python teams with test suites over 2 minutes on a single worker
review.not_for: Small codebases where parallelism adds complexity without payoff
